name: BrightBooks
features: multi-currency invoicing (60+ currencies including EUR native)
real-time bank feeds (Barclays, HSBC, Lloyds, Starling, Monzo, NatWest)
instant reconciliation engine (tested to 1M rows in under 30 seconds)
audit trail export: PDF with digital signature and tamper-evident hash
UK payroll sync (PayAxis native, no middleware)
cash flow forecasting with scenario modelling
24/7 support SLA with dedicated account manager
known_limitations: AI anomaly detection not yet available — roadmap Q4 2025
Some reviewers note UI less customisable than legacy tools
Migration from VaultLedger requires professional services engagement
